meaning: New Technology File System,新技术文件系统
examples: Note: This will only work with NTFS formatted drives.
This tab exists only for files stored on NTFS volumes.
Recover Deleted Files on an NTFS Hard Drive from a Ubuntu Live CD
This new setup program immediately saw that I had an empty and idle 240GB drive (already formatted as NTFS using Windows 7's stock disc management utility) and allowed me to install Windows 8 there.
